title: Publish a TypeScript Library to npm
description: Complete route from a TypeScript project to a published, CI-tested, automatically-released npm package — with linting, tests, versioning with Changesets, and keyless OIDC publishing.

steps.description: Configure ESLint flat config for code quality enforcement
Add unit tests with Vitest — fast, TypeScript-native, with coverage reporting
Set up CI pipeline to run lint and tests on every push and pull request
Add Changesets for semantic versioning — contributors add changeset files, bot bumps package.json and generates CHANGELOG
Configure OIDC-based keyless npm publishing from GitHub Actions — no npm tokens to rotate or leak
